item.title: Last saturday Manifest celebrated 30 years of misbehaving responsibly, that’s a ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (8 medier)

@manifest.raw

Last saturday Manifest celebrated 30 years of misbehaving responsibly, that’s a little over my entire life span, and I’m forever happy to be a part of the fresh energy in my only 5 years in the crew 🖤 - I wouldn’t have wanted to be anywhere else in the world - cheers to 30 more, and many more pictures coming 🫶🏻 @manifest_cph

📸 @andersdalhoej

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:

@manifest.raw

item.title: Backstage moment with @pennyvalent 🔥 Approaching people, with a camera after the...
item.description:
@manifest.raw

Backstage moment with @pennyvalent 🔥

Approaching people, with a camera after their performance at events can sometimes be a bit…. scary - and feel like you’re invading peoples personal recharge space, but a kind approach turned out to be the most casual and comfy 15 minutes chilling and chatting at @manifest_cph 🖤

Cheers to the backstage - Cheers to @pennyvalent and your great performance 🖤
item.content:encoded:
@manifest.raw

Backstage moment with @pennyvalent 🔥

Approaching people, with a camera after their performance at events can sometimes be a bit…. scary - and feel like you’re invading peoples personal recharge space, but a kind approach turned out to be the most casual and comfy 15 minutes chilling and chatting at @manifest_cph 🖤

Cheers to the backstage - Cheers to @pennyvalent and your great performance 🖤
item.author: manifest.raw
